<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Ordering\ValueObjects;

final class OrderLine
{
    public function __construct(
        public readonly ProductId $product,
        public readonly int $quantity,
        public readonly \Koine\Runtime\Decimal $unitPrice
    ) {
    }

    public function subtotal(): \Koine\Runtime\Decimal
    {
        return $this->unitPrice->mul((new \Koine\Runtime\Decimal($this->quantity)));
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->product->equals($other->product)
            && $this->quantity === $other->quantity
            && $this->unitPrice->equals($other->unitPrice);
    }
}
